jobs.title: One Identity Manager Engineer
jobs.description:
Join the IAM team with a strong focus on  Identity Governance and Administration (IGA)  using  One Identity Manager .

You will manage identity lifecycle processes, application integrations, and governance workflows, contributing to a secure and compliant IAM environment.

Your key tasks 
- Operate, maintain, and evolve  One Identity Manager  platforms
- Design, implement, and support  Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML)  processes
- Manage workflows, role models, access policies, and certifications
- Integrate applications and target systems into the IGA platform
- Maintain synchronization, mappings, and job server operations
- Contribute to access control governance for  privileged and non-privileged identities
- Monitor platform health, troubleshoot issues, and provide  L2/L3 support
- Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and runbooks aligned with audit and compliance requirements

## Qualifiche

- Degree in IT or equivalent professional experience
- Strong hands-on experience with  One Identity Manager
- Solid background in  Identity Governance / IGA
- Knowledge of  Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP, and authentication concepts
- Working knowledge of  SQL
- Strong documentation mindset and compliance awareness
- Fluent English
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Knowledge of   One Identity Safeguard
- Proficiency in  PowerShell, Terraform, and Ansible
- Italian

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.

descriptionByLocale.it: Unisciti al team IAM con un forte focus su Identity Governance e Administration (IGA) utilizzando One Identity Manager. Gestirai i processi di ciclo di vita dell'identità, le integrazioni delle applicazioni e i flussi di lavoro di governance, contribuendo a un ambiente IAM sicuro e conforme. I tuoi compiti principali - Operare, mantenere ed evolvere le piattaforme One Identity Manager - Progettare, implementare e supportare i processi Joiner / Mover / Leaver (JML) - Gestire flussi di lavoro, modelli di ruolo, politiche di accesso e certificazioni - Integrare applicazioni e sistemi target nella piattaforma IGA - Mantenere la sincronizzazione, le mappature e le operazioni del server di lavoro - Contribuire alla governance del controllo degli accessi per identità privilegiate e non privilegiate - Monitorare la salute della piattaforma, risolvere i problemi e fornire supporto L2/L3 - Mantenere la documentazione tecnica, le SOP e le runbook allineate con i requisiti di audit e conformità ## Qualifiche - Laurea in IT o esperienza professionale equivalente - Esperienza pratica con One Identity Manager - Solida conoscenza di Identity Governance / IGA - Conoscenza di Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, LDAP e concetti di autenticazione - Conoscenza di SQL - Mentalità fortemente documentale e consapevolezza della conformità - Inglese fluente Sarebbe un vero vantaggio se avessi - Conoscenza di One Identity Safeguard - Competenza in PowerShell, Terraform e Ansible - Italiano ## Informazioni aggiuntive Ci rendiamo conto che gestire l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e al fine di supportare questo, siamo lieti di offrire lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. jobs.title: IT Operation Center Specialist
jobs.description:
The Operation Center Specialist is responsible for monitoring and maintaining the health and performance of our IT systems and batch processing jobs.
This role is crucial in ensuring the smooth operation of our IT infrastructure and applications, and the timely execution of critical business processes.
Your key tasks
- System Monitoring: - Proactively monitor system performance and availability metrics
- Identify and troubleshoot system anomalies and performance bottlenecks
- Respond to system alerts and alarms in a timely and efficient manner
- Escalate critical issues to appropriate technical teams

- Batch Processing: - Schedule, monitor, and troubleshoot batch jobs
- Ensure the timely and accurate execution of batch processes
- Investigate and resolve batch job failures

- Incident Management: - Document and track incidents in accordance with established procedures
- Ensure the engagement of all required teams to resolve incidents

Given that our work involves handling data in Switzerland,  we require applicants to be Swiss residents .

## Qualifiche

- Good understanding of IT infrastructure components (servers, networks, databases)
- Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills
- Strong attention to detail
- Ability to work independently and in a team environment
- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with a good level of fluency in English
- Full availability to work in shifts, including nights, weekends and public holidays
It would be a real bonus if you have 
- Experience with system monitoring tools (e.g. PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana)
- Knowledge of batch processing concepts and tools (e.g. Zena)
- Experience with ITIL frameworks
- Knowledge of cloud technologies

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

jobs.title: HR Projects & Business Management Lead
jobs.description:
This is a fantastic opportunity for a strategic and execution-focused Projects & Business Management Lead to join us and support the Business Area Head for People & Communications and the broader People & Communications function. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, operations, and transformation, ensuring that key initiatives across People, Culture, and Communications are effectively designed, executed, and delivered.
You will act as a strategic partner and program leader, translating priorities into structured programs, driving cross-functional initiatives, and ensuring strong governance, reporting, and follow-through. A key focus of the role will be supporting the development of a modern, data-informed, and business-oriented People & Communications function, helping shape how the function operates, delivers value, and partners with the business.
This role is ideal for someone who combines strategic thinking with hands-on project execution and enjoys working in a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
Program Management
- Lead and manage strategic initiatives across People, Culture, Communications and Location Management.
- Translate functional strategy into structured programs, roadmaps, and execution plans.
- Coordinate cross-functional projects involving HR, Communications, Leadership, and other business teams.
- Track milestones, risks, budgets, and deliverables to ensure successful execution.
Building a Modern People & Communications Function
- Support the design and implementation of a modern, future-oriented People & Communications function working together with the Divisions
- Help define operating models, governance, and ways of working that enable strong business partnerships and impactful delivery.
- Contribute and/or drive initiatives related to employee experience, data-insight and digital HR, process improvement and Communications
- Identify opportunities to improve processes, increase impact, and leverage data and technology in decision-making.
- Contribute to strengthening the function’s role as a strategic partner to the business and a people advocate
Business Management & Operational Excellence
- Support the annual planning cycle for the BA, including strategic priorities, OKRs, and budgeting.
- Monitor performance and progress of key initiatives through dashboards and reporting.
- Ensure operational alignment and prioritization across the People & Communications organization.
- Improve processes, governance, and ways of working within the function.
Executive Support
- Prepare high-quality briefing materials, analysis, and presentations for executive leadership.
- Connects within the People & Communications functions as well as with our people across Avaloq to provide insights on trends, people engagement, culture, and communication effectiveness.
- Conduct research and benchmarking on best practices in people and communications strategy and organizational transformation.
- Support the preparation of materials for executive committees and board discussions.
Change & Transformation
- Drive the planning and follows implementation of major people and culture initiatives.
- Coordinate change management and communication strategies to ensure successful adoption.
- Monitor impact and progress of transformation programs.
Governance & Stakeholder Coordination
- Establish governance frameworks for major initiatives.
- Organize and support leadership forums, steering committees, and project boards.
- Ensure alignment across HR, Communications, and other business functions.
- Track decisions, actions, and accountability across strategic programs.

## Qualifiche

- Strong track record of experience in strategy, consulting, program management, HR, or business operations.
- Experience leading complex cross-functional projects or transformation initiatives.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate strategy into action.
- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills with experience preparing executive-level presentations and reports.
- Highly organized with strong project management capabilities with the ability to navigate ambiguity and drive progress in a dynamic environment.
It would be a real bonus if you have:
- Experience in management consulting, corporate strategy, or people strategy/HR transformation.
- Familiarity with people analytics, organizational design, digital HR tools, or culture initiatives.
- Experience working with senior executives or leadership teams.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titleByLocale.it: Lead Progetti HR e Gestione aziendale
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable de projets RH et de gestion commerciale

descriptionByLocale.it: Questa è un'opportunità fantastica per un Lead Progetti e Gestione aziendale strategico e orientato all'esecuzione di unirsi a noi e supportare il Capo dell'Area Business per le Persone e le Comunicazioni e la più ampia funzione Persone e Comunicazioni. Questo ruolo si trova all'intersezione tra strategia, operazioni e trasformazione, garantendo che le iniziative chiave in materia di persone, cultura e comunicazioni siano progettate, eseguite e consegnate in modo efficace. Sarai un partner strategico e un leader di programma, traducendo le priorità in programmi strutturati, guidando iniziative cross-funzionali e garantendo una forte governance, reporting e follow-through. Un focus chiave del ruolo sarà quello di supportare lo sviluppo di una funzione Persone e Comunicazioni moderna, basata sui dati e orientata al business, aiutando a definire come la funzione opera, fornisce valore e si associa con il business. Questo ruolo è ideale per qualcuno che combina pensiero strategico con esecuzione di progetti hands-on e ama lavorare in un ambiente veloce e altamente collaborativo. Gestione dei Programmi - Guidare e gestire iniziative strategiche in materia di persone, cultura, comunicazioni e gestione della sede. - Tradurre la strategia funzionale in programmi strutturati, roadmaps e piani di esecuzione. - Coordinare progetti cross-funzionali che coinvolgono HR, Comunicazioni, Leadership e altri team aziendali. - Monitorare traguardi, rischi, budget e deliverable per garantire un'esecuzione di successo. Costruzione di una funzione Persone e Comunicazioni moderna - Supportare la progettazione e l'attuazione di una funzione Persone e Comunicazioni moderna e futura, lavorando insieme alle Divisioni. - Aiutare a definire modelli operativi, governance e modi di lavorare che consentano forti partnership aziendali e una consegna efficace. - Contribuire e/o guidare iniziative relative all'esperienza dei dipendenti, ai dati e alla tecnologia HR digitale, al miglioramento dei processi e alle Comunicazioni. - Identificare opportunità per migliorare i processi, aumentare l'impatto e sfruttare i dati e la tecnologia nelle decisioni. - Contribuire a rafforzare il ruolo della funzione come partner strategico del business e come sostenitore delle persone. Gestione aziendale e eccellenza operativa - Supportare il ciclo di pianificazione annuale per l'Area Business, comprese priorità strategiche, OKR e budget. - Monitorare le prestazioni e i progressi delle iniziative chiave attraverso dashboard e reporting. - Garantire l'allineamento operativo e la priorità all'interno dell'organizzazione Persone e Comunicazioni. - Migliorare i processi, la governance e i modi di lavorare all'interno della funzione. Supporto esecutivo - Preparare materiali di briefing di alta qualità, analisi e presentazioni per la leadership esecutiva. - Collegarsi all'interno delle funzioni Persone e Comunicazioni nonché con le persone di Avaloq per fornire informazioni su tendenze, coinvolgimento delle persone, cultura ed efficacia della comunicazione. - Condurre ricerche e benchmarking sulle migliori pratiche in materia di strategia delle persone e delle comunicazioni e trasformazione organizzativa. - Supportare la preparazione di materiali per comitati esecutivi e discussioni del consiglio. Cambiamento e trasformazione - Guidare la pianificazione e seguire l'attuazione di importanti iniziative per le persone e la cultura. - Coordinare le strategie di gestione del cambiamento e della comunicazione per garantire un'adozione di successo. - Monitorare l'impatto e i progressi dei programmi di trasformazione. Governance e coordinamento degli stakeholder - Stabilire quadri di governance per le principali iniziative. - Organizzare e supportare forum di leadership, comitati direttivi e consigli di progetto. - Garantire l'allineamento tra HR, Comunicazioni e altre funzioni aziendali. - Monitorare decisioni, azioni e responsabilità in materia di programmi strategici. Requisiti: - Esperienza consolidata in strategia, consulenza, gestione di programmi, HR o operazioni aziendali. - Esperienza nella guida di progetti complessi cross-funzionali o iniziative di trasformazione. - Forti capacità analitiche e di risoluzione dei problemi con la capacità di tradurre la strategia in azione. - Eccellenti capacità di gestione degli stakeholder e di comunicazione con esperienza nella preparazione di presentazioni e rapporti di livello esecutivo. - Altamente organizzato con forti capacità di gestione dei progetti con la capacità di navigare nell'ambiguità e guidare il progresso in un ambiente dinamico. Ulteriori informazioni: Siamo consapevoli che la gestione dell'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e al fine di supportare questo siamo lieti di offrire lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendiamo che il successo del nostro business è costruito sulla potenza di opinioni diverse, siamo totalmente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva dove puoi essere te stesso. Assumiamo, compensiamo e promuoviamo senza distinzione di origine, età, identità di genere, orientamento sessuale o qualsiasi altra caratteristica fantastica che ci rende unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di notare che non accetteremo candidature speculative da agenzie di reclutamento e qualsiasi candidatura non sollecitata sarà esente da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento.
descriptionByLocale.en: This is a fantastic opportunity for a strategic and execution-focused Projects & Business Management Lead to join us and support the Business Area Head for People & Communications and the broader People & Communications function. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, operations, and transformation, ensuring that key initiatives across People, Culture, and Communications are effectively designed, executed, and delivered. You will act as a strategic partner and program leader, translating priorities into structured programs, driving cross-functional initiatives, and ensuring strong governance, reporting, and follow-through. A key focus of the role will be supporting the development of a modern, data-informed, and business-oriented People & Communications function, helping shape how the function operates, delivers value, and partners with the business. This role is ideal for someone who combines strategic thinking with hands-on project execution and enjoys working in a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment. Program Management - Lead and manage strategic initiatives across People, Culture, Communications and Location Management. - Translate functional strategy into structured programs, roadmaps, and execution plans. - Coordinate cross-functional projects involving HR, Communications, Leadership, and other business teams. - Track milestones, risks, budgets, and deliverables to ensure successful execution. Building a Modern People & Communications Function - Support the design and implementation of a modern, future-oriented People & Communications function working together with the Divisions - Help define operating models, governance, and ways of working that enable strong business partnerships and impactful delivery. - Contribute and/or drive initiatives related to employee experience, data-insight and digital HR, process improvement and Communications - Identify opportunities to improve processes, increase impact, and leverage data and technology in decision-making. - Contribute to strengthening the function’s role as a strategic partner to the business and a people advocate Business Management & Operational Excellence - Support the annual planning cycle for the BA, including strategic priorities, OKRs, and budgeting. - Monitor performance and progress of key initiatives through dashboards and reporting. - Ensure operational alignment and prioritization across the People & Communications organization. - Improve processes, governance, and ways of working within the function. Executive Support - Prepare high-quality briefing materials, analysis, and presentations for executive leadership. - Connects within the People & Communications functions as well as with our people across Avaloq to provide insights on trends, people engagement, culture, and communication effectiveness. - Conduct research and benchmarking on best practices in people and communications strategy and organizational transformation. - Support the preparation of materials for executive committees and board discussions. Change & Transformation - Drive the planning and follows implementation of major people and culture initiatives. - Coordinate change management and communication strategies to ensure successful adoption. - Monitor impact and progress of transformation programs. Governance & Stakeholder Coordination - Establish governance frameworks for major initiatives. - Organize and support leadership forums, steering committees, and project boards. - Ensure alignment across HR, Communications, and other business functions. - Track decisions, actions, and accountability across strategic programs. ## Qualifiche - Strong track record of experience in strategy, consulting, program management, HR, or business operations. - Experience leading complex cross-functional projects or transformation initiatives. - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate strategy into action. - Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills with experience preparing executive-level presentations and reports. - Highly organized with strong project management capabilities with the ability to navigate ambiguity and drive progress in a dynamic environment. It would be a real bonus if you have: - Experience in management consulting, corporate strategy, or people strategy/HR transformation. - Familiarity with people analytics, organizational design, digital HR tools, or culture initiatives. - Experience working with senior executives or leadership teams. ## Informazioni aggiuntive We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.
descriptionByLocale.de: Dies ist eine fantastische Gelegenheit für einen strategischen und umsetzungsorientierten Leiter von HR-Projekten und Business Management, sich uns anzuschließen und den Bereichsleiter für People & Communications und die breitere Funktion People & Communications zu unterstützen. Diese Rolle befindet sich an der Schnittstelle zwischen Strategie, Operationen und Transformation und stellt sicher, dass wichtige Initiativen in den Bereichen People, Kultur und Kommunikation effektiv gestaltet, ausgeführt und geliefert werden. Sie werden als strategischer Partner und Programmmanager fungieren, Prioritäten in strukturierte Programme übersetzen, bereichsübergreifende Initiativen vorantreiben und eine starke Governance, Berichterstattung und Umsetzung sicherstellen. Ein wichtiger Schwerpunkt der Rolle wird die Unterstützung der Entwicklung einer modernen, dateninformierten und geschäftsorientierten Funktion People & Communications sein, die hilft, die Funktionsweise, die Wertschöpfung und die Partnerschaft mit dem Unternehmen zu gestalten. Diese Rolle ist ideal für jemanden, der strategisches Denken mit praktischer Projektumsetzung kombiniert und gerne in einer schnelllebigen, hochkooperativen Umgebung arbeitet. Programmmanagement: - Leitete und verwalten Sie strategische Initiativen in den Bereichen People, Kultur, Kommunikation und Standortmanagement. - Übersetzen Sie die funktionale Strategie in strukturierte Programme, Roadmaps und Ausführungspläne. - Koordinieren Sie bereichsübergreifende Projekte, an denen HR, Kommunikation, Führung und andere Geschäftsteams beteiligt sind. - Verfolgen Sie Meilensteine, Risiken, Budgets und Lieferanten, um eine erfolgreiche Umsetzung sicherzustellen. Aufbau einer modernen Funktion People & Communications: - Unterstützen Sie die Gestaltung und Umsetzung einer modernen, zukunftsorientierten Funktion People & Communications, die mit den Divisionen zusammenarbeitet. - Helfen Sie bei der Definition von Betriebsmodellen, Governance und Arbeitsweisen, die starke Geschäftspartnerschaften und eine wirkungsvolle Lieferung ermöglichen. - Beitragen und/oder vorantreiben Sie Initiativen im Zusammenhang mit Mitarbeitererfahrung, Daten-Insight und digitalem HR, Prozessverbesserung und Kommunikation. - Identifizieren Sie Möglichkeiten, Prozesse zu verbessern, die Wirkung zu erhöhen und Daten und Technologie bei der Entscheidungsfindung zu nutzen. - Beitragen Sie zur Stärkung der Rolle der Funktion als strategischer Partner des Unternehmens und als Menschenanwalt. Business Management & Operative Exzellenz: - Unterstützen Sie den jährlichen Planungszyklus für den Geschäftsbereich, einschließlich strategischer Prioritäten, OKRs und Budgetierung. - Überwachen Sie die Leistung und den Fortschritt wichtiger Initiativen durch Dashboards und Berichterstattung. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die operative Ausrichtung und Priorisierung innerhalb der Organisation People & Communications erfolgt. - Verbessern Sie Prozesse, Governance und Arbeitsweisen innerhalb der Funktion. Exekutivsupport: - Bereiten Sie hochwertige Briefing-Materialien, Analysen und Präsentationen für die Führungskräfte vor. - Vernetzen Sie sich innerhalb der Funktionen People & Communications sowie mit unseren Mitarbeitern bei Avaloq, um Einblicke in Trends, Mitarbeiterengagement, Kultur und Kommunikationseffektivität zu geben. - Führen Sie Recherchen und Benchmarking zu bewährten Praktiken in der Strategie für Menschen und Kommunikation und organisationaler Transformation durch. - Unterstützen Sie die Vorbereitung von Materialien für Führungskräfteausschüsse und Vorstandsdiskussionen. Veränderung und Transformation: - Führen Sie die Planung und Umsetzung wichtiger Initiativen für Menschen und Kultur vor. - Koordinieren Sie Change-Management- und Kommunikationsstrategien, um eine erfolgreiche Adoption sicherzustellen. - Überwachen Sie die Auswirkungen und den Fortschritt von Transformationsprogrammen. Governance & Stakeholder-Koordination: - Etablieren Sie Governance-Rahmen für wichtige Initiativen. - Organisieren und unterstützen Sie Führungsforen, Lenkungsausschüsse und Projektboards. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Ausrichtung über HR, Kommunikation und andere Geschäftsfunktionen erfolgt. - Verfolgen Sie Entscheidungen, Aktionen und Verantwortlichkeiten über strategische Programme. Anforderungen: - Erfahrung in Strategie, Beratung, Programmmanagement, HR oder Business Operations. - Erfahrung in der Leitung komplexer bereichsübergreifender Projekte oder Transformationsinitiativen. - Starke analytische und problemlösende Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Strategie in Aktion zu übersetzen. - Ausgezeichnete Fähigkeiten zur Stakeholder-Verwaltung und Kommunikation mit Erfahrung in der Vorbereitung von Präsentationen und Berichten auf höchster Ebene. - Hochorganisiert mit starken Fähigkeiten zum Projektmanagement mit der Fähigkeit, in einer dynamischen Umgebung zu navigieren und Fortschritte zu erzielen. Zusätzliche Informationen: Wir sind uns bewusst, dass die Verwaltung der Work-Life-Balance eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem täglichen Leben erleben, und um dies zu unterstützen, bieten wir hybride und flexible Arbeitsmöglichkeiten für die meisten unserer Avaloqer an, um die Work-Life-Balance aufrechtzuerhalten und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, die Vielfalt zu umarmen und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Macht unterschiedlicher Meinungen beruht. Wir sind herzlich dazu bereit, eine gleichberechtigte Umgebung und eine inklusive Kultur zu fördern, in der Sie Ihre wahre authentische Selbst sein können. Wir stellen, vergüten und befördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Merkmalen, die uns alle einzigartig machen. Wir haben uns bemüht, diese Anzeige in einer inklusiven und neutralen Weise zu schreiben.
descriptionByLocale.fr: C'est une fantastique opportunité pour un responsable de projets RH et de gestion commerciale stratégique et axé sur l'exécution de rejoindre notre équipe et de soutenir le responsable de la zone commerciale pour les personnes et les communications et la fonction plus large de personnes et de communications. Ce rôle se situe à l'intersection de la stratégie, des opérations et de la transformation, garantissant que les initiatives clés dans les domaines des personnes, de la culture et de la communication sont conçues, exécutées et livrées efficacement. Vous serez un partenaire stratégique et un leader de programme, traduisant les priorités en programmes structurés, pilotant des initiatives transversales et garantissant une gouvernance forte, un reporting et un suivi. Un focus clé du rôle sera de soutenir le développement d'une fonction de personnes et de communications moderne, basée sur les données et orientée vers l'entreprise, en aidant à façonner la façon dont la fonction opère, fournit de la valeur et s'associe avec l'entreprise. Ce rôle est idéal pour quelqu'un qui combine une pensée stratégique avec une exécution de projet pratique et qui aime travailler dans un environnement rapide et hautement collaboratif. Gestion de programme: - Diriger et gérer des initiatives stratégiques dans les domaines des personnes, de la culture, de la communication et de la gestion de site. - Traduire la stratégie fonctionnelle en programmes structurés, en feuille de route et en plans d'exécution. - Coordonner des projets transversaux impliquant les ressources humaines, la communication, la direction et d'autres équipes commerciales. - Suivre les jalons, les risques, les budgets et les livrables pour garantir une exécution réussie. Construction d'une fonction de personnes et de communications moderne: - Soutenir la conception et la mise en œuvre d'une fonction de personnes et de communications moderne et future, en travaillant avec les divisions. - Aider à définir les modèles opérationnels, la gouvernance et les façons de travailler qui permettent des partenariats commerciaux solides et une livraison efficace. - Contribuer et/ou piloter des initiatives liées à l'expérience des employés, à l'analyse de données et à la technologie RH numérique, à l'amélioration des processus et à la communication. - Identifier les opportunités pour améliorer les processus, augmenter l'impact et tirer parti des données et de la technologie dans la prise de décision. - Contribuer au renforcement du rôle de la fonction en tant que partenaire stratégique de l'entreprise et que défenseur des personnes. Gestion commerciale et excellence opérationnelle: - Soutenir le cycle de planification annuel pour la zone commerciale, y compris les priorités stratégiques, les OKR et la budgétisation. - Suivre les performances et les progrès des initiatives clés à travers des tableaux de bord et des rapports. - Assurer l'alignement opérationnel et la priorisation au sein de l'organisation des personnes et de la communication. - Améliorer les processus, la gouvernance et les façons de travailler au sein de la fonction. Support exécutif: - Préparer des documents d'information de haute qualité, des analyses et des présentations pour la direction exécutive. - Se connecter au sein des fonctions de personnes et de communications ainsi qu'avec nos collaborateurs chez Avaloq pour fournir des informations sur les tendances, l'engagement des personnes, la culture et l'efficacité de la communication. - Mener des recherches et des benchmarks sur les meilleures pratiques en matière de stratégie des personnes et de la communication et de transformation organisationnelle. - Soutenir la préparation de documents pour les comités exécutifs et les discussions du conseil. Changement et transformation: - Piloter la planification et le suivi de la mise en œuvre d'initiatives majeures pour les personnes et la culture. - Coordonner les stratégies de gestion du changement et de communication pour garantir une adoption réussie. - Suivre l'impact et les progrès des programmes de transformation. Gouvernance et coordination des parties prenantes: - Établir des cadres de gouvernance pour les initiatives majeures. - Organiser et soutenir les forums de direction, les comités de pilotage et les conseils de projet. - Assurer l'alignement entre les ressources humaines, la communication et d'autres fonctions commerciales. - Suivre les décisions, les actions et la responsabilité à travers les programmes stratégiques. Exigences: - Expérience dans la stratégie, le conseil, la gestion de programme, les ressources humaines ou les opérations commerciales. - Expérience dans la conduite de projets complexes à travers les fonctions ou d'initiatives de transformation. - Compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes solides avec la capacité de traduire la stratégie en action. - Excellentes compétences en gestion des parties prenantes et en communication avec l'expérience de la préparation de présentations et de rapports de niveau exécutif. - Hautement organisé avec de solides capacités de gestion de projet avec la capacité de naviguer dans l'ambiguïté et de faire progresser dans un environnement dynamique. Informations supplémentaires: Nous réalisons que la gestion de l'équilibre travail-vie privée est un défi que nous affrontons tous dans notre vie quotidienne et afin de soutenir cela, nous sommes heureux d'offrir un travail hybride et flexible pour la plupart de nos collaborateurs Avaloq pour maintenir l'équilibre travail-vie privée et continuer notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. Chez Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d'embrasser la diversité et de comprendre que le succès de notre entreprise est construit sur la puissance de différentes opinions, nous sommes entièrement engagés à promouvoir un environnement d'égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être votre véritable soi authentique. Nous embauchons, rémunérons et promouvons sans distinction d'origine, d'âge, d'identité de genre, d'orientation sexuelle ou de toute autre caractéristique fantastique qui nous rend uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire cette annonce de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n'accepterons pas les candidatures spéculatives d'agences de recrutement et toute candidature non sollicitée sera exonérée de toute attente de paiement.

jobs.title: Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert - FiRE
jobs.description:
This role combines Swiss prudential regulation expertise with hands‑on ownership of the FiRE legal reporting platform and business analysis skills to translate regulation into technical requirements. 


As a Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert, you will be responsible for ensuring full and timely compliance with Swiss and Liechtenstein regulatory reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures, etc.) through the effective use, configuration, and enhancement of the FiRE reporting tool.

Your key tasks
- Own the end‑to‑end regulatory reporting process in FiRE for SNB statistics, Basel IV capital, liquidity ratios, large exposures, market and country risk, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely submission to the competent authorities
- Interpret regulatory texts (FINMA circulars, SNB guidelines, Basel standards) and translate them into clear business rules, data mappings, and technical specifications for implementation in FiRE and upstream systems
- Monitor regulatory developments affecting Swiss and cross‑border reporting and assess their impact on existing FiRE configurations, reporting logic, and data requirements; drive or coordinate corresponding change initiatives
       FiRE ownership and technical duties
- Configure and maintain FiRE (interfaces and client configuration), in close cooperation with IT and the software provider, to reflect current legal requirements and bank‑specific needs
- Define, document, and prioritise detailed functional and technical requirements for changes to FiRE and upstream data sources, based on regulatory interpretation and operational constraints
- Perform and coordinate functional testing (SIT/UAT) for new FiRE releases and regulatory changes, including non‑regression tests, reconciliation checks, and defect management until production sign‑off
       Governance, controls and stakeholders
- Design and operate data quality and control frameworks around FiRE (validation checks, reconciliations with general ledger and risk systems, sign‑off workflows), and document procedures in line with internal policies and audit expectations
- Act as primary point of contact for internal stakeholders (Finance, Risk, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legal) on Swiss regulatory reporting topics and for external stakeholders (FINMA, SNB, auditors) regarding FiRE‑generated reports

## Qualifiche

- University degree in Finance, Economics, Law, or a related field, with 3–5+ years of experience in banking regulatory reporting or prudential regulation, ideally in the Swiss market
- In‑depth knowledge of Swiss prudential and statistical reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures), and proven ability to interpret and operationalise regulatory texts
- Hands‑on experience with regulatory reporting tools, preferably FiRE (or similar solutions), including configuration, data mapping, and testing; strong understanding of banking products (loans, securities, derivatives, off‑balance‑sheet items)
- Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with high attention to detail and data quality, and the ability to challenge inconsistencies across systems and reports
- Excellent communication skills, capable of drafting clear technical specifications and documentation and of bridging regulatory, business, and IT perspectives
- Team‑oriented, proactive, and autonomous working style, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines
- Fluency in English plus German or French is preferred for roles in the Swiss banking sector

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.  
#LI-Hybrid

titleByLocale.fr: Expert en Reporting Réglementaire Suisse - FiRE

descriptionByLocale.it: Questa posizione combina l'esperienza di regolamentazione prudenziale svizzera con la gestione pratica della piattaforma di reporting legale FiRE e le competenze di analisi aziendale per tradurre le regolamentazioni in requisiti tecnici. Come Esperto Regolamentare Svizzero, sarai responsabile per garantire la conformità completa e tempestiva con le normative di reporting svizzere e liechtensteinesi (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidità, grandi esposizioni, ecc.) attraverso l'efficace utilizzo, configurazione e miglioramento dell'strumento di reporting FiRE. I tuoi compiti principali - Assicurare la gestione completa del processo di reporting regolamentare in FiRE per le statistiche SNB, il capitale Basel IV, i tassi di liquidità, le grandi esposizioni, il rischio di mercato e paese, garantendo accuratezza, completamento e consegna tempestiva alle autorità competenti - Interpretare i testi regolamentari (circolari FINMA, linee guida SNB, standard Basel) e tradurli in regole aziendali chiare, mappature dei dati e specifiche tecniche per l'implementazione in FiRE e nei sistemi superiori - Monitorare le innovazioni regolamentari che influenzano il reporting svizzero e transfrontaliero e valutare il loro impatto sulle configurazioni esistenti di FiRE, la logica di reporting e i requisiti di dati; guidare o coordinare le iniziative di cambiamento corrispondenti Gestione FiRE e compiti tecnici - Configurare e mantenere FiRE (interfacce e configurazione client), in stretto collaborazione con IT e il fornitore del software, per riflettere le attuali normative legali e le esigenze specifiche del banco - Definire, documentare e priorizzare i dettagli delle funzionalità e dei requisiti tecnici per i cambiamenti a FiRE e ai fonti di dati superiori, basati sull'interpretazione regolamentare e le restrizioni operative - Eseguire e coordinare i test funzionali (SIT/UAT) per le nuove versioni di FiRE e i cambiamenti regolamentari, inclusi i test di non regressione, le verifiche di riconciliazione e la gestione dei difetti fino alla firma di produzione Governance, controlli e stakeholder - Disegnare e operare i framework di qualità dei dati e dei controlli intorno a FiRE (verifiche di validità, riconciliazioni con il libro generale e i sistemi di rischio, workflow di firma), e documentare le procedure in linea con le politiche interne e le aspettative di audit - Attuare il ruolo di punto di contatto principale per gli stakeholder interni (Finanza, Rischio, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legale) sui temi di reporting regolamentare svizzero e per gli stakeholder esterni (FINMA, SNB, auditatori) riguardo ai report generati da FiRE

descriptionByLocale.de: Diese Position kombiniert Schweizer-Prudenzregulierungs-Expertise mit der praktischen Verantwortung für die rechtliche Berichterstattungspiataform FiRE und Geschäftsanalyseskills, um Regulierungen in technische Anforderungen zu übersetzen. Als Schweizer Regulatorischer Berater bist du verantwortlich für die Sicherstellung vollständiger und pünktlicher Einhaltung der Schweizer und Liechtensteinischen Berichterstattungsanforderungen (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, Liquidität, große Auslagen, etc.) durch effektive Nutzung, Konfiguration und Verbesserung der FiRE-Berichtungs-Tool. Deine Hauptaufgaben - Verantwortung für den End-to-End-Regulatorischen Berichterstattungsprozess in FiRE für SNB-Statistiken, Basel IV-Kapital, Liquiditätsverhältnisse, große Auslagen, Markt- und Landrisiken, sicherzustellen, dass die Genauigkeit, Vollständigkeit und pünktliche Abgabe an die zuständigen Behörden gewährleistet sind - Interpretation der regulatorischen Texte (FINMA-Schaltungen, SNB-Leitlinien, Basel-Standards) und Übersetzung in klare Geschäftsregeln, Datenmappings und technische Spezifikationen für die Implementierung in FiRE und aufwärts Systeme - Überwachung der regulatorischen Entwicklungen, die Schweizer und transnationale Berichterstattung beeinflussen, und Bewertung ihrer Auswirkungen auf die bestehenden FiRE-Konfigurationen, Berichterstattungslogik und Datenanforderungen; Führung oder Koordination der entsprechenden Änderungsinitiativen FiRE-Ownership und technische Aufgaben - Konfiguration und Wartung von FiRE (Interfaces und Kundeneinstellungen), in enger Zusammenarbeit mit IT und dem Softwareanbieter, um die aktuellen rechtlichen Anforderungen und banken-spezifischen Bedürfnisse zu reflektieren - Definition, Dokumentation und Priorisierung der detaillierten funktionalen und technischen Anforderungen für Änderungen an FiRE und aufwärts Datenquellen, basierend auf der regulatorischen Interpretation und operativen Einschränkungen - Durchführung und Koordination funktionaler Tests (SIT/UAT) für neue FiRE-Versionen und regulatorische Änderungen, einschließlich nicht-regressions-Tests, Rekonziliationsprüfungen und Defektmanagement bis zur Produktionsabnahme Governance, Kontrollen und Stakeholder - Design und Betrieb von Datenqualitäts- und Kontrollrahmen um FiRE (Validierungsprüfungen, Rekonziliationen mit dem allgemeinen Buchhaltungs- und Risikosystemen, Abnahmeprozesse), und Dokumentation der Verfahren im Einklang mit internen Richtlinien und Audit-Erwartungen - Funktion als Hauptkontaktpunkt für interne Stakeholder (Finanz, Risiko, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Recht) zu Schweizer regulatorischen Berichterstattungsfragen und für externe Stakeholder (FINMA, SNB, Auditors) bezüglich FiRE-generierter Berichte
descriptionByLocale.fr: Cette position combine l'expertise en régulation prudente suisse avec la gestion pratique de la plateforme de reporting légal FiRE et les compétences en analyse d'entreprise pour traduire les régulations en exigences techniques. En tant qu'Expert en Reporting Réglementaire Suisse, vous serez responsable de garantir la conformité complète et à temps avec les exigences de reporting suisse et liechtensteinoises (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidité, grandes expositions, etc.) par l'utilisation efficace, la configuration et l'amélioration de l'outil de reporting FiRE. Vos principales tâches - Assurer la gestion complète du processus de reporting réglementaire en FiRE pour les statistiques SNB, le capital Basel IV, les ratios de liquidité, les grandes expositions, les risques de marché et pays, en garantissant l'exactitude, la complétude et la soumission à temps aux autorités compétentes - Interpréter les textes réglementaires (cirulaires FINMA, lignes directrices SNB, normes Basel) et les traduire en règles d'affaires claires, mappages de données et spécifications techniques pour l'implémentation dans FiRE et les systèmes supérieurs - Surveiller les développements réglementaires affectant le reporting suisse et transfrontalier et évaluer leur impact sur les configurations existantes de FiRE, la logique de reporting et les exigences de données; conduire ou coordonner les initiatives de changement correspondantes Gestion FiRE et tâches techniques - Configurer et maintenir FiRE (interfaces et configuration client), en étroite collaboration avec IT et le fournisseur de logiciels, pour refléter les exigences légales actuelles et les besoins spécifiques du banquier - Définir, documenter et prioriser les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques détaillées pour les modifications à FiRE et les sources de données supérieures, basées sur l'interprétation réglementaire et les contraintes opérationnelles - Effectuer et coordonner les tests fonctionnels (SIT/UAT) pour les nouvelles versions de FiRE et les modifications réglementaires, y compris les tests de non-régression, les vérifications de réconciliation et la gestion des défauts jusqu'à l'approbation de production Governance, contrôles et parties prenantes - Concevoir et exploiter les cadres de qualité des données et de contrôle autour de FiRE (contrôles de validation, réconciliations avec le grand livre et les systèmes de risque, workflows d'approbation), et documenter les procédures en ligne avec les politiques internes et les attentes d'audit - Agir comme le point de contact principal pour les parties prenantes internes (Finance, Risque, IT, Front Office, Conformité, Droit) sur les questions de reporting réglementaire suisse et pour les parties prenantes externes (FINMA, SNB, auditeurs) concernant les rapports générés par FiRE

jobs.title: Apprendista di commercio AFC con Maturità
jobs.description:
Apprendista di commercio AFC
A partire da metà agosto 2026 siamo alla ricerca di un/a apprendista di commercio AFC presso la nostra sede a Bioggio.
Durante i tre anni di apprendistato, ti offriamo la possibilità di imparare diversi compiti in ambito amministrativo all’interno di un’azienda leader del mercato svizzero per le soluzioni software bancario integrato.
Inoltre, trascorrerai 2 giorni alla settimana presso la scuola di apprendistato commerciale e parteciperai di tanto in tanto a corsi interaziendali, dove potrai acquisire ulteriori conoscenze e competenze.
 
Principali compiti e responsabilità:
- Fornire supporto amministrativo in varie aree, tra cui contabilità, risorse umane e facility management
- Consulenza a clienti, fornitori e dipendenti al telefono o via e-mail
- Organizzazione e coordinamento di riunioni ed eventi per vari team
- Creazione ed elaborazione di documenti e presentazioni
- Elaborazione e riconciliazione di fatture e pagamenti
In ogni reparto avrai un referente che si occuperà di te e sarà pronto ad aiutarti per qualsiasi domanda e a darti consigli.
Se ti piace lavorare in gruppo e al computer, ti piace il contatto con le persone, sei affidabile e indipendente, allora l'apprendistato commerciale in Avaloq è la strada giusta per te.
Sei pronto per il tuo futuro in Avaloq?

## Qualifiche

Requisiti necessari:
- Buon rendimento scolastico
- Spiccato interesse per le tematiche economiche
- Adattabilità, motivazione e indipendenza e un forte senso di responsabilità
- Buone doti organizzative e propensione al lavoro in team
- Attenzione ai dettagli e precisione
- Italiano fluente / madrelingua, conoscenza dell'inglese
- Domicilio in Svizzera
- Iscrizione alla scuola di commercio

## Informazioni aggiuntive

In Avaloq abbracciamo la diversità e la differenza. Ci impegniamo con tutto il cuore per le pari opportunità di impiego e promuoviamo una cultura inclusiva in cui i contributi di tutti sono valorizzati e le loro voci ascoltate. Assumiamo, retribuiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'orientamento sessuale, dall'identità di genere o da qualsiasi altra affascinante caratteristica che ci rende diversi. Si prega di notare che le nostre descrizioni delle mansioni sono scritte in un linguaggio inclusivo e neutro rispetto al genere.
Accettiamo esclusivamente candidature online, preferibilmente con documenti in formato pdf, in italiano o in inglese. Oltre al CV, si prega di allegare alla domanda tutti i certificati della scuola secondaria e una lettera di motivazione.
